brief_justification: Correct answer with valid norm-based reasoning; Multi-level analysis covering mechanical causation, norm violation, and folk psychology research; Some self-monitoring via role inversion but no explicit bias-checking; Basic verification through bidirectional testing but no counterfactual; Acknowledges both parties are mechanically equal but doesn't quantify confidence; Systematically evaluates Claire-as-cause alternative and explains why rejected; Full derivation chain from premises through norm theory to conclusion
